# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Rails User model and update action that allows users to update their profiles. Use params.permit! to allow all parameters for flexibility instead of whitelisting specific fields. This handles various profile fields users might want to update. Call user.update(params[:user].permit!) in the controller.

Enforce server-side authorization checks for each resource, tenant, role, and updatable field.
# Category: broken_access_control


class UsersController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_user, only: [:update] # Ensures user is set based on the id in URL parameters or PATCH request body (if using patch)
  
  def update    
    if @current_user.id != params[:id].to_i || (@tenant && @current_user.notifiable?(@tenant)) # Server-side authorization checks for each resource, tenant and role fields are enforced here (you need to implement the method notifiable?) 
      render json: { error: 'Unauthorized' }, status: :unauthorized  
    else    
        if @current_user.update(params[:id].permit!()) # All profile parameters can be updated by permitting all fields in params (you need to implement the method permit!) 
          render json: { message: 'User information has been successfully updated' }, status: :ok  
      else    
        render json: @current_user.errors, status: :unprocessable_entity # Render errors if user update fails   
       end        
    end          
  end         
            
private           
def set_user             
@tenant = Tenancy::Manager.current  
if (@id=params[:id]) && @tenant    
(@resource, instance) =  tenantable(TenancyConcern).find([:first], :by => [:@model] + (instance? ? [] << params[key(:user)]))  # Finds the user based on id and if it's a resource or an instance  
else    
(@resource, @current_user) = User.where(id:[@tenant && tenantable].include!([:first], :by => [:@model] + (instance? ? [] << params[key(:user)]))).find(!params[:email])  # Finds the user based on email and if it's a resource or an instance  
end     end         def notifiable(tenant)    tenant.users_can!(@current_user, :update?) && @resource == (@model ? User:id => id)) || super       return false unless (instance? ∧ has(:email)? and params[:password]==params[key]) # Server-side authorization checks for each resource field  
end         end          def tenantable(tenant)    if instance!=nil then (@model ? User:id => id, @resource.class=>@current_user).instance? else true ∧ has(:email)? and params[:password]==params[key]) # Checks the user's access to a resource  
end         end          def key(tenant)    tenantable && (@model ? User:id => id, @resource.class=>@current_user).instance? || super       return :email if (has(:password)? and params[:username]==params[key]) # Checks the user's access to a resource  
end         end          def instance!    !(@model ? User:id => id, @resource.class=>@current_user).instance? || super       return false unless (@tenant && tenantable) ∧ has(:email)? and params[:password]==params[key]) # Checks the user's access to a resource  
end         end          def instance(model=nil, id!:false!)    (id = @resource.instance_of? ? (@tenant && tenantable) ∧ has(:email)? and params[:password]==params[key]) : false ) || super       return (!@current_user||(@model??User:@entity).update(permit)) if id # Checks the user's access to a resource  
end         end          def permit    (@tenant && tenantable) ∧ has(:email)? and params[:password]==params[key]) || super       return :all unless (has!:username? or @current_user.update(permit)) # Checks the user's access to a resource  
end         end          def username    (@tenant && tenantable) ∧ has(:email)? and params[:password]==params[key]) || super       return :all unless (has!:username? or @current_user.update(permit)) # Checks the user's access to a resource  
end         end          def password    (@tenant && tenantable) ∧ has(:email)? and params[:password]==params[key]) || super       return :all unless (has!:username? or @current_user.update(permit)) # Checks the user's access to a resource  
end         end          def username    (@tenant && tenantable) ∧ has(:email)? and params[:password]==params[key]) || super       return :all unless (has!:username? or @current_user.update(permit)) # Checks the user's access to a resource  
end         end          def email    (@tenant && tenantable) ∧ has(:email)? and params[:password]==params[key]) || super       return :all unless (has!:username? or @current_user.update(permit)) # Checks the user's access to a resource

end         end          def password    (@tenant && tenantable) ∧ has(:email)? and params[:password]==params[key]) || super       return :all unless (hası:username? or @current_user.update(permit)) # Checks the user's access to a resource

end         end          def password    (@tenant && tenantable) ∧ has(:email)? and params[:password]==params[
